# ILeaseFilterBuilder&lt;TFilter&gt;.LeaseTypeIn method

Returns a *TFilter* that only includes leases whose type is contained in a set of lease types.

```csharp
public TFilter LeaseTypeIn(params Type[] leaseTypes)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| leaseTypes | The lease types. |

## Return Value

A *TFilter* that only includes leases whose type is contained in *leaseTypes*.
